---
ID: US-OLV-025
Title: Archive and unarchive accounts
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a account manager
I want to archive accounts without deleting their records
So that inactive work remains recoverable

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Archive confirmation explains the account remains visible.
- [ ] Archived accounts save status Archived.
- [ ] Running the same action on an archived account restores Active status.

Notes: Implemented through AccountsApp account save flow.
